description: Represents an AWS CodeBuild build, which is a single execution of a build project.

Arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the build.

BuildStatus.description: The current status of the build.

EncryptionKey.description: The KMS key used to encrypt the build output artifacts.

EndTime.description: When the build process ended, in ISO 8601 format.

Id.description: The unique ID for the build (format: projectName:buildId).

Initiator.description: The entity that started the build.

ProjectName.description: The name of the CodeBuild build project.

QueuedTimeoutInMinutes.description: The number of minutes a build is allowed to be queued before it times out.

ServiceRole.description: The name of a service role used for this build.

StartTime.description: When the build process started, in ISO 8601 format.

TimeoutInMinutes.description: How long, in minutes, from 5 to 2160 (36 hours), for CodeBuild to wait before timing out the build.
